# exportBrowserData(_:)

**Instance Method**

Exports the given browser data.

## Declaration

```swift
@nonobjc final func exportBrowserData(_ browserDataStream: AsyncStream<BEBrowserData>) async throws
```

## Parameters

- **browserDataStream**: An asynchronous stream of browser data to export.

## Discussion

Call this method to stream browsing data to the system, as identified by [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEExportOptions/dataTypes-swift.property].

Use this method after [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataExportManager/requestExport(for:token:completionHandler:)] returns an [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEExportOptions] with [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEExportOptions/exportToFiles] = `false`, or when the system launches your app as part of the transfer of browsing data to another browser.

For more information, see [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/transferring-browsing-data-to-another-browser].

## Exporting browser data

- **requestExport(for:token:completionHandler:)**: Requests that the system display the browsing-data transfer sheet to export data to another browser.
